name: instant-api — SLO any-endpoint 5xx spike > 5% (5m)
description: Critical: page when ANY single endpoint's 5xx rate exceeds 5% for 5 minutes. This complements the broader instant-api 5xx-rate-high alert (which fires on aggregate 5xx > 1% across all endpoints) by catching localized regressions that don't move the overall rate enough to trip the global alert — e.g. /webhook/new failing 100% while everything else is healthy. FACET request.uri so each affected endpoint opens its own incident. Sourced from Transaction events emitted by the Fiber NR middleware.

nrql.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(httpResponseCode) >= 500) FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' FACET request.uri
